  • Module

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AircraftCarrier
Represents an Aircraft Carrier ship in Battleship.
AircraftCarrierShape
Represents an Aircraft Carrier ship model in the game.
Board
Represents the 10x10 Battleship game board.
BoardListener
Listener interface for board state changes.
Cell
Represents an individual cell within the Battleship game board.
CellState
Represents the current state of a single cell on the Battleship grid.
Colors
Utility color palette defining color constants for ship 2D vector rendering in JavaFX.
Coordinate
Represents an immutable 2D grid position on the Battleship board.
Destroyer
Represents a Destroyer ship in Battleship.
DestroyerShape
Utility factory for constructing the graphical 2D JavaFX representation of a Destroyer ship.
EndController
Controller class for the game over / end game screen in Battleship.
Fleet
Manages the collection of ships belonging to a player's board in Battleship.
Frigate
Represents a Frigate ship in Battleship.
FrigateShape
Utility factory for constructing the graphical 2D JavaFX representation of a Frigate ship.
GameController
Main controller for the Battleship gameplay view.
GameManager
Manages the state and turn-based flow of a Battleship match.
GamePersistenceException
Custom exception class for handling errors that occur during game state persistence operations.
GameSaver
Utility class for managing game persistence operations in Battleship.
GameSession
Singleton class managing global game sessions and persistence operations in Battleship.
Gradients
Utility factory for constructing pre-configured JavaFX LinearGradient paints.
HumanPlayer
Represents the human player in the Battleship game.
HuntTargetStrategy
Implements the Hunt-and-Target AI shooting strategy for Battleship.
InvalidCoordinateException
Exception thrown when an invalid grid coordinate is accessed or targeted.
InvalidShipSizeException
Exception thrown when a ship's expected size does not match the actual number of grid cells provided.
IPlayer
Defines the core operations and behaviors required for a Battleship player.
IShootingStrategy
Strategy interface defining targeting algorithms for AI players in Battleship.
MachinePlayer
Represents the AI (machine) player in the Battleship game.
Main
Clase principal que inicia la aplicación de Battleship.
MenuController
Controller class for the main menu screen of the Battleship application.
ModelToViewMapper
Mapper utility class that synchronizes a model Board instance with a JavaFX GridPane UI representation.
Orientation
Represents the directional orientation of a ship when placed on the grid.
PlacementController
Controller class for the fleet placement setup phase in Battleship.
Player
Abstract base class representing a player in the Battleship game.
RepeatedShotException
Exception thrown when a player attempts to shoot at a coordinate that has already been targeted.
SceneManager
Singleton manager class responsible for controlling window transitions, loading FXML layouts, and applying application-wide styling and window icons in JavaFX.
Ship
Abstract base class representing a naval vessel on the game board.
ShipFactory
Factory class responsible for instantiating specific Ship implementations.
ShipOverLapException
Exception thrown when attempting to place a ship on coordinates that overlap with another ship already positioned on the board.
ShipShapeFactory
Factory class responsible for instantiating JavaFX Group vector graphics corresponding to specific ship types and applying spatial orientation transformations.
ShipType
Defines the specific types of ships available in the Battleship game.
ShipView
JavaFX Group component representing the visual display of a vessel on the game board grid.
ShootingMode
Represents the AI player's active shooting strategy mode in Battleship.
ShotMarkView
Visual shot marker component drawn over an individual board cell using JavaFX Group shapes.
Submarine
Represents a Submarine ship in Battleship.
SubmarineShape
Utility factory for constructing the graphical 2D JavaFX representation of a Submarine.
